ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the image library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the image library */,
  "supported_operations" TEXT /* Operations supported by the library */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for installing the library on different operating systems */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies required for the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the server environment */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the environment */,
  "supported_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences supported in the environment */,
  "supported_libraries" TEXT /* Image libraries supported in the environment */,
  "supported_operations" TEXT /* Operations supported in the environment */,
  "default_file_permissions" TEXT /* Default file permissions for the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the image operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image operation */,
  "supported_libraries" TEXT /* Image libraries that support this operation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters required for the operation */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the operation can be reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preference being set */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the preference */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the setting is applied */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the setting is the default value */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
